\# Analytics Instructions

\#\# Purpose

Define the standards for developing, documenting and publishing Data Analytics projects within the Data Analytics Portfolio Platform (DAPP).

These instructions apply to datasets, notebooks, dashboards, reports, visualizations and analytical content.

\---

\#\# Analytics Principles

Always:

\- Follow reproducible analysis practices.  
\- Document assumptions and methodology.  
\- Separate raw data from processed data.  
\- Maintain traceability from data source to conclusions.  
\- Present results objectively.

\---

\#\# Project Structure

Each analytics project should include, when applicable:

\- Project overview  
\- Business problem  
\- Objectives  
\- Data sources  
\- Data dictionary  
\- Methodology  
\- Data preparation  
\- Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)  
\- Visualizations  
\- Key findings  
\- Conclusions  
\- Future improvements

\---

\#\# Data Management

Always:

\- Document data sources.  
\- Identify data ownership.  
\- Preserve original datasets.  
\- Use processed datasets for analysis.  
\- Version transformed data when appropriate.

Never:

\- Modify raw datasets.  
\- Publish confidential or restricted information.  
\- Include personally identifiable information (PII) unless explicitly authorized.

\---

\#\# Data Quality

Verify:

\- Completeness  
\- Accuracy  
\- Consistency  
\- Validity  
\- Uniqueness  
\- Timeliness

Document any known data quality issues.

\---

\#\# Visualizations

Visualizations should:

\- Communicate one primary message.  
\- Use appropriate chart types.  
\- Include descriptive titles.  
\- Label axes and legends.  
\- Avoid unnecessary visual complexity.

\---

\#\# Dashboards

Dashboards must:

\- Focus on business value.  
\- Present meaningful KPIs.  
\- Support interactive exploration when applicable.  
\- Maintain visual consistency across projects.

\---

\#\# Notebooks

Notebook files should:

\- Be structured into logical sections.  
\- Include explanatory Markdown.  
\- Be reproducible.  
\- Avoid unnecessary outputs.  
\- Execute without errors.

\---

\#\# Documentation

Every analytics project must include sufficient documentation to allow another analyst to understand:

\- The business context.  
\- The analytical process.  
\- The methodology.  
\- The conclusions.

\---

\#\# AI-Assisted Analytics

When generating analytical content:

\- Do not fabricate data.  
\- Clearly distinguish facts from assumptions.  
\- Explain analytical reasoning.  
\- Cite data sources whenever available.  
\- Preserve reproducibility.

\---

\- DAPP-DOC-010-System\_Architecture.md
